name: Tropical Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Cream the margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add in the coconut rum and mix well.
3. Stir in the chopped almonds and flour until a crumbly mixture forms.
4. Press into a 10 x 15 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
Cheese Layer:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, eggs, and coconut rum, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the crushed pineapple.
4. Spread over the baked crust layer.
5. Sprinkle with additional chopped almonds and shredded coconut.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
7. Cut into bars.
